I  EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
This document describes the quality of the reprocessed (REP/DT)  Data Unification and Altimeter 
Combination System (DUACS) products in the frame of the Climate Change Copernicus Service (C3S),  
listed here after. The REP product featured in this document covers the period from 1993 to present. 
The dataset is regularly updated with a nearly 6-month delay. 
 
Product SEALEVEL_GLO_PHY_CLIMATE_L4_MY_008_057 
Area Global ocean 
Satellites Merging measurements from two different altimeters with orbits like/close to Topex/Poseidon and ERS-1 
historical orbits 
Spatial resolution 1/4° x 1/4° Cartesian grid 
Temporal resolution 1 day 
 
The number of altimeter data processed by the system varies with time, according to satellite  
availability. The reader can refer to the C3S Product User Guide Specification (PUGS, see the

catalog_entry.summary: This document describes the quality of reprocessed DUACS products for C3S, focusing on sea level anomalies and related variables over a global ocean grid with daily temporal resolution.

product_line.name: Global Ocean Sea Level Climate Product
